careNotes: This is a mirror, not a verdict.
If this does not fit, rename it or hide it.
Some seasons are quiet; silence does not need to prove anything.
clusterLines: {{theme}} appeared more than once, usually with {{emotion}} nearby.
identityDriftLines: Compared with earlier echoes, {{currentPeriod}} showed more {{emotion}}.
Your attention seemed to drift from {{fromTheme}} toward {{toTheme}}.
The tone moved {{direction}}, but not in a straight line.
